note: Burnt area per year in the EU-27, in thousands of hectares, as mapped by EFFIS (European Forest Fire Information System). Approximate, rounded figures; EFFIS records begin in 2006.

record2025.augustBurst: 22 very large fires in Portugal and Spain in three weeks burned 460,585 ha
